queue.task: Implement parametric cost model: replace binary index-vs-scan choice with cost comparison. Sequential scan cost = pages * seq_page_cost + rows * cpu_tuple_cost. queue.summary: Parametric cost model implemented! PG-compatible cost parameters (seq_page_cost, random_page_cost, cpu_tuple_cost, cpu_index_tuple_cost, cpu_operator_cost). queue.summary: Found real bug: ROLLBACK did not undo physical heap+index changes. After BEGIN→INSERT→ROLLBACK, index still had key blocking re-insert. Fixed with _txWriteLog that tracks INSERTs and undoes them on ROLLBACK. 14 UNIQUE constraint tests (basic, MVCC, edge cases) all pass.
